nasb.text: Also some of the Asiarchs who were friends of his sent to him and repeatedly urged him not to venture into the theater.

esv.text: And even some of the Asiarchs, who were friends of his, sent to him and were urging him not to venture into the theater.

cnv.text: 還有幾位亞西亞的首長，是保羅的朋友，派人來勸他，不要冒險到劇場裡去。

ccb.text: 他的好友——亚细亚的几位官员也派人劝他别冒险进入戏院。

csbs.text: 还有一些亚细亚省的官员，是保罗的朋友，也派人劝他不要自己冒险到剧场去。
